text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Another day, another great concert!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
During the concert, I kept thinking...<n>having me
here must be a bother.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What? No, not at all! I'm actually<n>super grateful
you joined us!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: We want to make a concert wherewe all get to sing, so no one's abother!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Besides, you've yet to attain<n>your
goal—the answer you seek.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're in good company too—more<n>and more
people have been wanting<n>to join!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Bourbon! You stopped by again!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, to resolve an error.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: An error?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Normally, the act of watching a<n>concert holds no
value beyond the<n>opportunity to study the dancing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have therefore judged race training<n>to be my
foremost priority.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, my brain output the<n>conclusion that I
must come here—an<n>error of unknown cause.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, I now request<n>permission to ask
a question.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Umm, sure. What is it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The error occurred on the day I first<n>watched your
concert.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Did you do anything to me that day?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I did, actually. I sang to you from the<n>bottom of my
heart, asking you to<n>join me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So if I had to take a guess, I think mysinging made you want to sing too.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Me... sing?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I bet you liked the idea of<n>belting out your
feelings to someone<n>at the top of your lungs.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you say? Want to work<n>towards the
Grand Concert with us?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, that "error" you<n>mentioned must be
your heart talking<n>to you. Don't you think you
should<n>listen to it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
And singing is the key to<n>understanding it, you
say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their singing seems to have moved<n>Mihono
Bourbon's heart.
